product_overview: NEXUS Panel is a React + Vite admin dashboard for managing game servers, nodes, users and egg configurations with authentication and an admin console. It provides CRUD surfaces for servers, nodes, users and eggs plus an admin dashboard for system stats.
core_goals: Provide secure user authentication and ensure the first registered user is given admin privileges
Expose an admin dashboard with system statistics and recent activity
Enable full lifecycle management of game servers including creation, power controls and console access
Allow creation and management of infrastructure nodes and system users
Support viewing and managing egg configurations used for server provisioning
Surface graceful error states when backend services (Wings daemon / API) are unavailable

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register and log in with credentials; automatically assign admin role to the first registered account.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill username/email input field -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password field -> Submit registration form -> Navigate to /login -> Fill username/email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Fill username/email input field -> Fill password input field -> Fill confirm password field with non-matching value -> Submit registration form -> See form validation errors
Navigate to /login -> Fill username/email input field -> Fill password input field with incorrect credentials -> Submit login form -> See authentication error or form validation errors
Register first account (via /register) -> Submit registration form -> See account created and assigned admin role when calling /api/auth/me

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Display high-level system statistics (servers, running servers, nodes, users) and recent activity for administrators.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> Be authenticated as admin -> View stat cards (Total Servers, Running Servers, Active Nodes, Active Users) -> View recent activity table
Navigate to /admin/dashboard -> Be authenticated as admin -> View stat cards showing mock or stale data when Wings daemon is unavailable -> See indication that live stats are unavailable

features.name: Server Management
features.description: Create, view and manage game servers; control server power state and interact with the server console.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/servers -> Be authenticated as admin -> View server data table -> Initiate server creation -> Fill server creation form (name, node, egg, memory, disk, cpu) -> Submit server creation form -> See new server listed in data table -> Navigate to /admin/servers/:id -> View server detail and 3 stat cards -> View console terminal -> Enter console commands -> Submit power action to start server -> See server status update to running

Navigate to /admin/servers -> Be authenticated as admin -> Initiate server creation -> Fill server creation form with missing required fields -> Submit server creation form -> See form validation errors

Navigate to /admin/servers -> Be authenticated as admin -> Navigate to /admin/servers/:id -> View console terminal -> Attempt to enter console commands -> See console connection failure when Wings daemon is not available

features.name: Node Management
features.description: Create and manage infrastructure nodes used to host servers.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/nodes -> Be authenticated as admin -> View node data table -> Initiate node creation -> Fill node creation form -> Submit node creation form -> See new node listed in data table
Navigate to /admin/nodes -> Be authenticated as admin -> Initiate node creation -> Fill node creation form with invalid or missing data -> Submit node creation form -> See form validation errors

features.name: User Management
features.description: List and create system users and manage their accounts from the admin interface.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users -> Be authenticated as admin -> View user data table -> Initiate user creation -> Fill user creation form -> Submit user creation form -> See new user listed in data table
Navigate to /admin/users -> Be authenticated as admin -> Initiate user creation -> Fill user creation form with missing fields -> Submit user creation form -> See form validation errors

features.name: Egg Management
features.description: View and manage egg configurations used for provisioning servers.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/eggs -> Be authenticated as admin -> View egg data table -> See list of egg configurations
Navigate to /admin/eggs -> Be authenticated as admin -> View egg data table while backend returns no data or errors -> See empty state or error indication

routes.description: Server detail with console and power controls

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and register with credentials, auto-assign admin role to first user

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: View system stats including total servers, running servers, active nodes, active users

features.name: Server Management
features.description: Create view and manage game servers with power controls and console
user_interactions: Click power buttons (Start Stop Restart Kill)

known_limitations.issue: Admin CRUD operations may not be fully connected to backend API
known_limitations.impact: Create/update/delete may only modify local state not persisted

known_limitations.issue: WebSocket console requires active Wings daemon connection
known_limitations.impact: Console terminal will not function without daemon

known_limitations.issue: Live stats require Wings daemon running on the node
known_limitations.impact: Stats will show mock or stale data without daemon
